name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 72 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 95+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 给 AI 智能体用的上下文运行时，读文件、跑命令、搜代码、看目录时自动接管，把喂给大模型的内容压缩到极致，适合做 Agent 时省 token、提效率。
